creator: lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk
text:
On Wed, May 21, 2014 at 11:23:57AM +0200, Frederic Culot wrote:
> Hi Lukas,
> 
> the PR number 190049 was opened to report a typo in sssd's rc.d init script.
> You can find it here:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/190049
> 
> Could you please tell us if you approve it so I can commit the patch?
> 
> Thanks,
> Frederic

I agree,
It should be sssd.conf

I've already notified to contact author of the change on efnet/#bsdports

LS
